figures.caption: Fig. 1 VAWT Schematic: (a) top view. (b) Quasi-3D settings showing the discretisation of the domain in the 𝑥 − 𝑦 plane using spectral/hp method and homogenous extrusion using Fourier planes in the spanwise (𝑧) direction over extrusion length 𝐿𝑧 .
Fig. 2 Cross-stream profiles of the time-averaged streamwise velocity at (a) 𝑥/𝑅 = 0.5 and (b) 𝑥/𝑅 = 2.0 for 𝜆 = 1.5. Present DNS with 𝑁𝑏𝑙𝑎𝑑𝑒𝑠 = 1 (blue line), experimental data of [5] (triangles).

Fig. 3 Phase-averaged normalised spanwise vorticity 𝜔∗ 𝑧 = 𝜔𝑧𝑐/𝑈∞ close to the blade for the one-bladed configuration at 𝜆 = 1.5. Subplots (a)–(h) correspond to phases 𝑡/𝑇 = 0, 0.14, 0.17, 0.29, 0.50, 0.63, 0.69, 0.85 respectively. The black arrows depict the velocity vector.

Fig. 4 Normalised phase-averaged spanwise vorticity 𝜔∗ 𝑧 = 𝜔𝑧𝑐/𝑈∞ over the rotor and near-wake region for the one-bladed configuration at 𝜆 = 1.5 for (a)–(h) corresponding to phases 𝑡/𝑇 = 0, 0.14, 0.17, 0.29, 0.50, 0.63, 0.69, 0.85 respectively. Vertical black line corresponds to 𝑥/𝑅 = 0.5, as seen in the validation.

Fig. 5 Normalised phase-averaged spanwise vorticity 𝜔∗ 𝑧 = 𝜔𝑧𝑐/𝑈∞ over the rotor and near-wake region for the two-bladed configuration at 𝜆 = 1.5 for (a)–(h) corresponding to phases 𝑡/𝑇 = 0, 0.16, 0.18, 0.26, 0.50, 0.63, 0.69, 0.84 respectively. Vertical black line corresponds to 𝑥/𝑅 = 0.5, as seen in the validation. Note that the text refers to the aerofoil coloured red.

Fig. 6 Normalised phase-averaged spanwise vorticity 𝜔∗ 𝑧 = 𝜔𝑧𝑐/𝑈∞ over the rotor and near-wake region for the three-bladed configuration at 𝜆 = 1.5 for (a)–(h) corresponding to phases 𝑡/𝑇 = 0, 0.17, 0.21, 0.29, 0.46, 0.66, 0.82, 0.87 respectively. Vertical black line corresponds to 𝑥/𝑅 = 0.5, as seen in the validation. Note that the text refers to the aerofoil coloured red.

Fig. 7 Phase-averaged normalised spanwise vorticity 𝜔∗ 𝑧 = 𝜔𝑧𝑐/𝑈∞ close to the blade for the three-bladed configuration at 𝜆 = 1.5. Subplots (a)–(h) correspond to phases 𝑡/𝑇 = 0.46, 0.48, 0.51, 0.54, 0.57, 0.59, 0.62, 0.65 respectively.

Fig. 8 Normalised phase-averaged spanwise vorticity 𝜔∗ 𝑧 = 𝜔𝑧𝑐/𝑈∞ over the rotor and near-wake region for the three-bladed configuration at 𝜆 = 4.5 for (a)–(h) corresponding to phases 𝑡/𝑇 = 0, 0.17, 0.21, 0.29, 0.46, 0.66, 0.82, 0.87 respectively. Vertical black line corresponds to 𝑥/𝑅 = 0.5, as seen in the validation. Note that the text refers to the aerofoil coloured red.
Fig. 9 Downstream evolution of the normalised maximum velocity deficit𝑈max 𝑐 /𝑈∞, for (a) 𝑁 = 1, 2, 3 with 𝜆 = 1.5 and (b) 𝜆 = 1.5, 2.5, 4.5 for 𝑁 = 3.
Fig. 10 Downstream evolution of the normalised wake centre 𝑦𝑐/𝑅. Shown for (a) 𝑁 = 1, 2, 3 with 𝜆 = 1.5 and (b) 𝜆 = 1.5, 2.5, 4.5 for 𝑁 = 3.

Fig. 11 Scaled velocity deficit profiles 𝑓 =𝑈𝑐/𝑈max 𝑐 with similarity variable 𝜂 = (𝑦 − 𝑦𝑐 )/𝛿𝑦 at six downstream locations (a). Shown for for the one-, and three-bladed configuration with 𝜆 = 1.5 (i,ii) and the three-bladed configuration with 𝜆 = 4.5 (iii). Additionally plotted are the corresponding fitted functional forms (b). Subplots (i–iii) follow the same layout as (a).

Fig. 12 Coefficient of determination 𝑅2 between the scaled velocity deficit profiles and the fitted functional form, as a function of downstream distance 𝑥/𝑅. Shown for (a) 𝑁𝑏𝑙𝑎𝑑𝑒𝑠 = 1, 2, 3 with 𝜆 = 1.5 and (b) 𝜆 = 1.5, 2.5, 4.5 for 𝑁𝑏𝑙𝑎𝑑𝑒𝑠 = 3.
